name: Calcolatore Rendimento Azioni
desc: Calcola Total return (%) = ((Final price + Dividends - Initial price) / Initial price) × 100. Esempio: Buy at €50, sell at €62, dividends €1.50 = Return = 27%....
description: Calcola Total return (%) = ((Final price + Dividends - Initial price) / Initial price) × 100. Esempio: Buy at €50, sell at €62, dividends €1.50 = Return = 27%....
seo_description: Calcola Total return (%) = ((Final price + Dividends - Initial price) / Initial price) × 100. Esempio: Buy at €50, sell at €62, dividends €1.50 = Return = 27%..
example_label: Calcolating totale return on stock bought at €45.50, sold at €58.75, with €3.20 dividends received.
result_context: The retorno_pct of {retorno_pct}% is your totale return including dividends. The ganancia of {ganancia} is profit per share.
formula_display: Totale Return% = [(Sale Price - Purchase Price + Dividends) ÷ Purchase Price] × 100
mistakes: Forgetting to include dividends in totale return calculation
Not accounting for transaction costs and taxes on gains
Comparing returns without considering holding period
